items.title: [负面] 走格子游戏太无聊了，游玩性太差，还没玩到瑟瑟的地方就坚持不下去了
items.summary: 走格子游戏太无聊了，游玩性太差，还没玩到瑟瑟的地方就坚持不下去了

items.title: [正面] This is a bit of a mix. Sure I can get into it but...
items.summary:
This is a bit of a mix. Sure I can get into it but all the side menuing really drains me when wanting to play more.

I'll keep it simple. For a free game I recommend it and honestly don't see any reason why people need to throw money at it for the fake currency, you get plenty as you play. But the game rogue like parts are very short, limited on the RNG which makes it more lite rogue like, and things just feel too easy. Always winning with no real struggle is boring to me and to get to the part that it gets good will require half a day or more to get there.

I think the game is a great pick if you just have something on the side to do while waiting for life to move forward, but not a great pick if you plan on focusing on it for long period of time.
